title: rubus hastifolius
intro: Rubus hastifolius, also known as the thorny raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hastifolius include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus hastifolius is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
